friendly_name: Lifecycle Gate Execution Context and Tool-Artifact Ownership
purpose_context: Spec Kitty lifecycle gates currently inherit whatever working tree their caller stood in, so a gate can evaluate a fact against a tree where that fact cannot be true and emit a confident wrong verdict. Separately, no component owns the bookkeeping files the toolchain itself generates, so each gate that trips over them has been taught a one-off exemption. This mission gives gates an explicit execution context they must be handed, and gives generated artifacts a lifecycle owner, so wrong verdicts and exemption lists both stop accumulating.
purpose_tldr: Gates judge the surface they are handed, and the toolchain owns the files it writes.
